name: Deluxe Vegetable Braise
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cauliflower, broken into medium-sized flowerettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice and prepare all vegetables.
2. Place oil in a wok and heat to smoking point. Add cauliflower to the wok, stirring until the oil coats most of it. Add 1/2 cup water, cover the wok, and cook the cauliflower for 4 minutes. Lift the cover and stir the cauliflower 2 or 3 times.
3. Add beans and stir. Cover the wok and cook the ingredients for another 4 minutes, lifting the cover to stir periodically.
4. Add broccoli, zucchini, and salt. Stir everything together. Cover the wok and cook all the ingredients for a further 7.5 minutes, lifting the cover to stir periodically.
5. When everything is cooked, transfer the food to a platter. If desired, sprinkle cashews over the dish before serving.
